props.name: alignment
props.description: Align the modal in the center or top of the screen.

props.name: className
props.description: A string of all className you want applied to the base component.

props.name: fullscreen
props.description: Set modal to covers the entire user viewport.

props.name: scrollable
props.description: Does the modal dialog itself scroll, or does the whole dialog scroll within the window.

props.name: size
props.description: Size the component small, large, or extra large.
